About Burlington Indivisible

Burlington Indivisible, an Indivisible chapter, is a grassroots organization based in Burlington, MA focussed on restricting the reach of ICE and organizing the political action necessary to ensure lasting, systemic change. Our mission is to empower people to rein in ICE, win elections that create lasting change, and support other Indisible causes.

1000 District Ave

We are one of several groups that protest the cruel and illegal actions at the ICE detention center on 1000 District Ave, Burlington, MA. Protests are on Monday–Saturday. Burlington Indivisible protests on Monday and Tuesday.

We Make It Easier to Get Involved

We make it easier to get involved. Our website curates the best organizations and resources so you can quickly find meaningful ways to act. Browse by resource or filter actions by cause, action type, frequency and mode.

We highlight established local groups that:

  • Meet regularly
  • Make participation accessible
  • Provide clear information
  • Have a track record of effective action
Note: This site will be updated regularly with new resources and information. You don't have to keep checking every page - just visit Latest Updates for a log of all recent changes and additions.
